define myns::sometype{

}

myns::sometype{
  'resource\\\'name':
}

Myns::Sometype['resource\\\'name']
Myns::Sometype['resource\\\'name']
Myns::Sometype["resource\\'name"]

Resource[Myns::Sometype, 'resource\\\'name', "resource\\'name"]

Resource[Myns::Sometype, 'resource\\\'name']{
  name => 42
}
